decision: Keep release-grade live-detector-evidence gate at warning. Rebuilt Linux smoke now passes UA, UA-CH fullVersionList on SannySoft, BrowserLeaks Client Hints, Pixelscan fingerprint-check, iphey, BrowserScan, and CreepJS, webdriver, locale/timezone, screen, storage quota, hardware, WebGL configured values, and repeat-consistent sanitized Canvas 2D probe hashes, and captures unscored WebAudio and FontFaceSet probes. Full headed/proxy BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS/SannySoft matrix remains incomplete.

surfaces.evidence: Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke using fingerprint.user_agent config reported navigator.webdriver=false and configured Chromium UA without HeadlessChrome.

Rebuilt packaged Linux runtime passed SannySoft/CDP UA-CH smoke, BrowserLeaks Client Hints page smoke, Pixelscan fingerprint-check UA-CH smoke, iphey UA-CH smoke, BrowserScan UA-CH smoke, and CreepJS UA-CH smoke. BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS observed navigator.userAgentData platform=Linux, platformVersion=6.8.0, architecture=x86, bitness=64, mobile=false, model empty, wow64=false, and fullVersionList containing Chromium 150.0.7871.101.
SannySoft local dogfood rerun observed MacIntel platform on macOS host; release-grade cross-platform persona coherence remains unproven.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported Intl timezone Asia/Taipei with wrapper TZ propagation plus renderer switch propagation.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported zh-TW, zh;q=0.9, en;q=0.8 language list.
Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py reported screen 1920x1080, available screen 1920x1040, and DPR=1 from configured fingerprint profile.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported hardwareConcurrency=8 and deviceMemory=8 from configured fingerprint profile.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP collector rendered a deterministic 64x32 Canvas 2D probe twice from fresh container launches with fingerprint.canvas_noise=23; sanitized data_url_sha256 and image_data_sha256 matched across repeats, and no raw data URL or pixel payload is committed.
Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP smoke reported Intel Inc. / Intel Iris OpenGL Engine from configured fingerprint profile.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke plus BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS page-context collectors rendered OfflineAudioContext length 44100 at sampleRate 44100 and recorded deterministic sanitized sum/sumAbs/first-sample summaries. CreepJS detector page metrics extraction now records detector-reported audio metric values from sanitized live page text. BrowserLeaks/CreepJS release-grade score comparison and native/headed matrix remain required.

Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke plus BrowserLeaks/Pixelscan/iphey/BrowserScan/CreepJS page-context collectors reported document.fonts.check availability for sampled desktop font families. CreepJS page context now also records bounded font metric rows plus aggregate glyph and metrics SHA-256 values. BrowserLeaks/CreepJS/Pixelscan detector score comparison and platform font corpus parity remain required.
CreepJS local dogfood smoke after WebRTC prefs/flag showed host connection blocked, foundation/ip unsupported/blocked, and stun connection blocked; no candidate IP literal was committed.
SannySoft local dogfood rerun reported Permissions prompt and HEADCHR_PERMISSIONS ok; broader CreepJS/BrowserLeaks permissions coverage remains absent.
Packaged Linux SannySoft/CDP smoke collected by scripts/detector_harness.py reported navigator.storage.estimate quota 8589934592 bytes for configured 8192 MiB storage quota.

Linux packaged SannySoft/CDP, BrowserLeaks, Pixelscan, iphey, BrowserScan, and CreepJS page-context collectors reported navigator.webdriver=false; SannySoft was verified in both headless and headed Docker/Xvfb display modes with configured UA omitting HeadlessChrome; CreepJS detector metrics reported 0% headless and 0% stealth with 19% like-headless in headless Docker.

Packaged Linux BrowserLeaks Client Hints smoke executed with Chromium configured for --proxy-server=<loopback-http-proxy>; the committed local CONNECT proxy observer summary recorded BrowserLeaks HTTPS tunnel traffic through the proxy. No external proxy exit-IP/geolocation detector run has been executed.
BrowseForge dogfood used distinct profile IDs and isolated same-origin localStorage across two sessions.
Linux x64 Docker SannySoft smoke now exists in both headless and headed/Xvfb display modes, in addition to macOS dogfood; Windows and headed native Linux/macOS detector matrix remains absent.
